generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a great panel on strategic autonomy. The experts agreed: we can't afford to rely on others for critical tech. Our allies are stretched thin, and waiting for them to lead just puts us at risk. Time to invest in our own capabilities - it's the only way to guarantee security in an uncertain world. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
